_instructions: SISTER: Update your complete product catalog here. All products and featured items in one place!

_fields.id: Unique product ID (never change existing IDs)
_fields.name: Product name as shown to customers
_fields.description: Product description for customers (short version for gift page cards, full version for product details page)
_fields.images: Array of product images (main image first, then additional views)
_fields.gif: Product GIF URL (optional, for animated product preview)
_fields.video: Product video URL (optional, for detailed product showcase)
_fields.category: Product category: gift-hamper, gift-box, bouquet, miniature, frame
_fields.occasion: Occasion: anniversary, birthday, proposal, wedding, graduation
_fields.inStock: true or false - whether product is available
_fields.specifications: Product specifications (material, size, weight, color, etc.)
_fields.shipping: Shipping information (delivery time, packaging, shipping cost, etc.)
_fields.topSelling: Featured products that appear on homepage

topSelling.title: Featured Miniature Frames
topSelling.description: Handcrafted frames for your special moments

products.name: Miniature Birthday Living Room
products.description:
• Handcrafted miniature frame with living room and birthday setup
• Beautiful  designed to capture special moments
• Features a cozy living room scene with birthday cake, décor, and tiny furniture details
• Perfect birthday gift for friends, partner, family members, or loved ones
• Ideal for birthday surprises, personalized gifts, and home décor
• Carefully crafted with fine detailing to create a realistic miniature birthday scene
• A creative custom miniature frame gift for birthdays and special celebrations

CUSTOMER REQUIREMENTS:-
1. 1 full length image (To be used as main picture)
2. 4 to 8 other pictures(for mini photo frame on walls)
3. Couple's interests, hobbies, likings around which other elements will be crafted (please be specific while providing details)
4. Any other specific detail/names/occasion/ hashtag
Please share all the details on WhatsApp number mentioned below
